description: File transfer workflow — import/export sequences that don't hit the step threshold
trigger_summary: Fires when the section mentions import or export actions that imply a repeatable file-transfer workflow.
trigger_criteria: keyword match: 'import file', 'export file', 'upload file', 'download file', 'import tags', 'export tags'
reason: File transfer process requires users to follow a sequence precisely

description: Source-to-target mapping tables for field or tag configuration
trigger_summary: Fires when the section describes source-to-target field mappings, data types, or tag mapping vocabulary.
trigger_criteria: keyword match: 'mapping', 'source field', 'target field', 'datatype', 'data type', 'field mapping'
content_type must be Reference or Procedure
reason: Mapping relationships are clearest in a structured table

description: Physical hardware setup — mounting, cabling, power
trigger_summary: Fires when the section describes physical installation tasks such as mounting, cabling, or power wiring.
trigger_criteria: keyword match: 'connect cable', 'mount device', 'power supply', 'din rail', 'wiring'
reason: Physical assembly steps need spatial reference that text cannot convey

description: Structured config examples — JSON, YAML, XML blocks
trigger_summary: Fires when the section contains code-like configuration content such as JSON, YAML, or XML examples.
trigger_criteria: keyword match: 'json payload', 'yaml config', 'xml schema', 'sample payload', 'example config'
requires a fenced code block or 3+ indented lines to be present
content_type must be Reference or Concept
reason: Structured configuration is easiest to read as a formatted code block
